reason: Fix fallbackSanitizer regex to capture parenthesized keys like verify(action="files") as a single key instead of splitting at the colon inside parens
Prefer exact permission match over wildcard in evaluate() so specific deny rules aren't overridden by less-specific catch-all allow rules from merged session config
Prefer exact permission match over wildcard in disabled() so specific deny rules aren't overridden by less-specific catch-all allow rules from merged session config
